title: ML / AI Engineer | Full Remote
description: You’re passionate about productionizing ML models and building LLM-powered features at scale?We have an exciting opportunity for one of our clients — a fast-growing tech company building AI-native products across fintech and e-commerce operations in emerging markets.Why this role: You’ll work directly with the Head of AI on roadmap delivery — building and shipping real ML and LLM features in production. This is not a research role — it’s hands-on AI engineering where your work ships to users from day one.About Talio Talent: Talio Talent is an international recruitment and talent placement hub, specialized in senior tech profiles. We connect professionals with international companies through:Rigorous selectionIntelligent matchingPersonalized supportWhat you’ll do:Build, deploy, and monitor ML models in productionBuild LLM-powered features — support automation, ops agents, document parsingSet up evaluation pipelines and online monitoringPartner with the Head of AI on roadmap deliveryPartner with backend teams on model serving infrastructureRequirements: Must-have — applications without these will not be considered.4+ years of ML / AI Engineering experience — mandatoryStrong Python — mandatoryPyTorch or TensorFlow — mandatoryExperience deploying models to production (FastAPI, SageMaker, Modal, or similar) — mandatoryHands-on experience with LLMs: RAG, function calling, agents, evals — mandatoryFluent English — mandatoryStrong pluses:MLOps tooling (MLflow, Weights & Biases)Computer vision experienceVector databases experienceKey soft skills:Strong problem-solving mindsetAutonomous and comfortable working remotelyCollaborative with cross-functional teamsPassionate about shipping AI features that reach real usersWhat we offer:Full remote positionWork directly with the Head of AIFast-moving, product-oriented AI environmentInternational and multicultural teamFull RemoteStart ASAP
